description: Adds circular section(s). Specify the circle either by a center plus a radius/point on the circumference, or by two diametrically opposite points.

keywords.name: center
keywords.description: Create a circle centered at location v1 (2D coordinate vector). Must be followed by a 'radius' or 'point' sub-keyword.

keywords.name: center-radius
keywords.description: Used after 'center <v1>'. Specifies the circle radius f.

keywords.name: center-point
keywords.description: Used after 'center <v1>'. Specifies a point v2 on the circle's circumference (2D coordinate vector).

keywords.name: point-1
keywords.description: Create a circle through two diametrically opposite points v1 and v2 (2D coordinate vectors) on the circumference.

keywords.name: point-1-quad-split
keywords.description: Used after 'point-1 <v1> point-2 <v2>'. Add a square block inside the circle with side length factor f (between 0.01 and 0.99). The square helps improve the shape of the zones inside the circle.
